narrative:
Johnstown-Monroe Local Sd (Licking) school district has 7,623 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
